texto: I suppose I look for humor in most situations because it humanizes things; it makes a character much more three-dimensional if there's some kind of humor. Not necessarily laugh-out-loud type of stuff, just a sense that there is a humorous edge to things. I do like that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Colm Meaney: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “I suppose I look for humor in most situations because it humanizes things; it makes a character m…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, character, look pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de look e kind.

frase_original: I suppose I look for humor in most situations because it humanizes things; it makes a character much more three-dimensional if there's some kind of humor. Not necessarily laugh-out-loud type of stuff, just a sense that there is a humorous edge to things. I do like that.

texto: I love doing comedy. You don't get many good comedy scripts. They're rare. But, I do love playing comedy. Even in drama, I like to try to find the humor because I think it's very human.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Colm Meaney: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I love doing comedy. You don't get many good comedy scripts. They're rare. But, I do love playing…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, love, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de good e think.

frase_original: I love doing comedy. You don't get many good comedy scripts. They're rare. But, I do love playing comedy. Even in drama, I like to try to find the humor because I think it's very human.
